mapper.select: SELECT * FROM menus ORDER BY parent_id ASC, sort_order ASC
SELECT * FROM menus WHERE is_active = TRUE AND is_deleted = FALSE ORDER BY parent_id ASC, sort_order ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO menus (parent_id, name, url, icon, sort_order, is_active, is_deleted, role) VALUES (#{parentId}, #{name}, #{url}, #{icon}, #{sortOrder}, #{isActive}, FALSE, #{role})
mapper.update: UPDATE menus SET parent_id = #{parentId}, name = #{name}, url = #{url}, icon = #{icon}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, is_active = #{isActive}, is_deleted = #{isDeleted}, role = #{role}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: UPDATE menus SET is_deleted = TRUE, is_active = FALSE WHERE id = #{id}
